description: Renders a polar function r = f(theta) on a 2D graph. Supports theta range restriction, filled polar regions, and curves such as roses, cardioids, limacons, and spirals.
utility: Plot a polar function r = f(theta) on a 2D graph

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 2D graph container to plot on

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Polar equation as ASCII math string using theta - e.g., "2 + cos(3*theta)"

arguments.name: range
arguments.description: Theta interval - e.g., range(0, 4*pi). Defaults to 0 to 2*pi

arguments.name: fillColor
arguments.description: Fill color for filled polar regions - e.g., fc(yellow)

alternates.description: Plot r = f(theta) over the default interval 0 to 2*pi
Archimedean spiral: r = theta over multiple revolutions
Polar curve with custom stroke color

examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,4), 20, 20, range(-4, 4), range(-4, 4), type(plotting))
polarplot(G, "2 + cos(3*theta)")

examples.scenario: Archimedean spiral over two full turns
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,4), 20, 20, range(-15, 15), range(-15, 15), type(plotting))
polarplot(G, "theta", range(0, 4*pi))

examples.scenario: Filled polar rose with yellow fill color
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,4), 20, 20, range(-4, 4), range(-4, 4), type(plotting))
polarplot(G, "2 + cos(3*theta)", fc(yellow))

G = g2d(at(4,4), 20, 20, range(-4, 4), range(-4, 4), type(plotting))
polarplot(G, "1 + cos(theta)", c(blue))
